PUFFER FISH
PREMIUM OUTERWEAR

Winter 2025 Collection

Introducing our most innovative puffer jackets yet. Designed for urban explorers who demand style and performance.

Explore Collection

The Urban Shield Collection

Our new line of premium puffer jackets combines cutting-edge insulation technology with urban-inspired design. Each piece is crafted to provide exceptional warmth without compromising on style.

The Urban Shield

Our signature puffer with enhanced insulation and a modern silhouette. Features a detachable hood and premium hardware.

Continental Drift

Designed for the global traveler, this versatile puffer offers exceptional warmth with a refined European-inspired aesthetic.

The Minimalist

Clean lines and essential features define this streamlined puffer. Perfect for those who appreciate understated luxury.

The Apex

Our most technical design featuring chevron quilting for optimal heat distribution and a sleek, athletic silhouette.

About The Collection

The Puffer Fish Winter 2025 Collection represents our commitment to redefining outerwear for the modern urban landscape. Each jacket in our lineup has been meticulously engineered to provide exceptional thermal protection while maintaining a distinctly contemporary aesthetic.

Our design team has spent two years perfecting these silhouettes, working with technical fabric specialists to develop proprietary materials that offer superior insulation without the bulk traditionally associated with winter jackets. The result is a collection that performs in the harshest conditions while maintaining a refined, streamlined appearance.

Sustainability remains at the core of our process. All insulation materials are derived from recycled sources, and our production facilities operate on renewable energy. We believe that premium performance and environmental responsibility can coexist.

The Urban Shield Collection will be available in limited quantities starting November 2024.
